text.title: Strategy Analysis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is engagement in pre-discovery / strategic framing phase?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Halt; do not author the artefact.
Run full strategy analysis with need + gaps + change strategy.

example.trace: phase=pre-discovery → kpis=yes → produced need + 7 gaps with closure plans across 24 months.
